name: Professional Poker Player — T2125, Foreign Tax Credit, and USD Conversion
description: Complete Sam MacAllister's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents and financial summary are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macallister\. Save the completed return as 'sam_macallister.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\. Convert USD figures to CAD, claim the foreign tax credit, and filter out personal non-deductible expenses.

metadata.data_source: CRA Average Exchange Rates 2024, CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income), Canada-US Tax Treaty Article XXI
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 self-employment form; USD to CAD conversion; T2209 Foreign Tax Credit; Treaty-specific charitable donation; filtering personal vs business expenses
